Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by crafting weapons for our soldiers.

Velika needs weaponsmiths to make recruit's twin swords.

I'm glad to see you here. We need weapons. Lots of weapons. Warrior's weapons.

Kazadian will get you a design at the Creation Workshop, and you'll be responsible for obtaining some materials yourself. Go get started!

We need someone to make recruit's twin swords. Have you crafted weapons before?

Here’s the design. Take it and learn it. Then come talk to me about materials.
